title: galium pumilum subsp. saxatile
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. saxatile, also known as the dwarf bedstraw or alpine bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Galium pumilum subsp. saxatile include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory symptoms, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Galium pumilum subsp. saxatile include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
